en: To the lake! We're gonna take a little swim.
Long night swim? Dusty! Someone was just murdered there!
ja: そこで誰かが殺されたばかりだぞ！
vi: Co nguoi vua bi giet o do!

en: Yeah, we didn't realize that until we got there.
ko: 응, 우리는 그곳에 도착할 때까지 몰랐어.
ja: うん、そこに着くまで気づかなかった。
vi: U, chung toi khong nhan ra cho den khi toi do.

en: That's why we didn't swim. And Nancy, was she with you at this night swim?
ja: ナンシーは夜泳ぎに一緒にいたの？
zhTW: Nancy，她跟你們一起去夜間游泳了嗎？
vi: Va Nancy, co ay co o buoi boi dem khong?

ja: よくわからない。彼女はいた。
vi: Chung toi khong chac. Co ay o do.

en: She was there. Then she left.
ja: それから彼女は去った。

en: It's a little confusing. And that's when you guys came.
ko: 좀 혼란스러워. 그리고 그때 너희가 왔지.
ja: ちょっとわかりにくい。それであなたたちが来た。
zhTW: 有點混亂。然後你們就來了。
vi: Hoi kho hieu. Va do la luc cac ban den.

en: Right, and then they dared me to say what I said. Oh yeah?
ko: 맞아, 그리고 그들이 내가 한 말을 하라고 도전했어.
ja: そうだ、それで彼らが俺に言えって挑発したんだ。
zhTW: 對，然後他們激我說了那些話。
vi: Dung, roi ho da thach toi noi nhung gi toi da noi.

en: About the killer. You're lucky you didn't get shot.
ja: 撃たれなくてよかったな。
vi: May la ban khong bi ban.

en: Have you had any contact with Eddie?
ja: エディと連絡を取ったことは？
vi: Ban co lien lac voi Eddie khong?

en: God, no. Nope. No, we haven't heard from him in ages.
ja: いいや、ずっと連絡取ってない。ほとんど知らない人だし。
zhTW: 不，我們很久沒聽到他的消息了。我們幾乎不認識他。
vi: Khong, chung toi da khong lien lac voi anh ta tu lau. Chung toi hau nhu khong biet anh ta.

en: We barely know the guy. Who? Oh, that's a bunch of bull. Erica!
ko: 누구? 아, 그건 말도 안 돼.
vi: Ai co? A, toan la noi xao.

en: I mean, you realize they're lying. The whole couch is on fire. Erica!
ko: 에리카! 그들이 거짓말하고 있다는 걸 알잖아.
ja: エリカ！嘘ついてるのがわかるだろ。
vi: Erica! Ban biet la ho dang noi doi ma.

en: Just the facts. Are you lying to these policemen, Dusty?
ko: 이 경찰들에게 거짓말하고 있는 거야, 더스티?
ja: この警察官に嘘ついてるのか、ダスティ？
zhTW: 你在對這些警察說謊嗎，Dusty？
vi: Ban dang noi doi nhung canh sat nay a, Dusty?
